task.plan.start: Received new input and started processing.
task.summary.thinking_only: Model produced internal reasoning and is waiting for the next step.
model.missing_api_key: Missing {env}, so model calls are disabled and only context is recorded.
tool.attention_context_list.description: List native attention contexts owned by the current runtime.
tool.attention_query.description: Query attention items with one Lucene-like query string. Supports clauses such as `context:ctx-chat-main`, `score:relay01`, `deep:2`, quoted phrases, and boolean operators. Plain text defaults to active work; explicit `score:`/`hash:` lookups include history unless `minscore` narrows it.
tool.attention_commit.description: Commit one attention mutation into the target context; `meta.author/source` default automatically when omitted, and `done=true` may be used without change or scores to clean the context and clear its current active scores.
tool.message_channel_list.description: Inspect available message channels and participants. Use this to find the right room or person before you reply, relay, coordinate, or follow up.
tool.message_channel_get.description: Inspect one known message channel by chatId when you need its participants or metadata before acting there.
tool.message_send.description: Send an actual visible message into a channel. Use it to acknowledge work, ask blocking questions, relay to another room, coordinate people, or deliver results back to the requester. If a cycle fans out from one room to others, the first visible acknowledgement must go to the originating room before relay rooms.
tool.message_send.origin_ack_fallback: Understood. I'll handle it and report back.
tool.terminal_list.description: List available terminals so you can choose the right operating-system workbench.
tool.terminal_focus.description: Update the focused terminal set with add/remove/replace/clear semantics.
tool.terminal_write.description: Type text or commands into a terminal and optionally submit them. Use it like a skilled shell user, not as a place to dump raw user chat without intent.
tool.terminal_read.description: Read a terminal's current output or diff so you can inspect command results and gather evidence.
tool.terminal_snapshot.description: Read the full terminal snapshot when the compact read is not enough.
tool.task_list.description: List all tasks and blocking relationships.
tool.task_get.description: Get details for a single task.
tool.task_import.description: Import AI-parsed markdown tasks into in-memory task system.
tool.task_create.description: Create a task (supports dependencies and triggers).
tool.task_done.description: Mark a task as done and return affected progress derivation.
tool.task_add_dependency.description: Add a dependency to a task.
tool.task_remove_dependency.description: Remove a dependency from a task.
tool.task_emit_event.description: Emit an external event to task system.
tool.terminal_create.description: Create or start a terminal instance and return its applied profile.
tool.terminal_get_config.description: Read terminal control-plane config, including transport discovery.
tool.terminal_set_config.description: Update terminal control-plane config for defaults, profiles, or transport.
